results.rendered_html:
abhijit (von ji mit abhi)
1〉 adj.
a〉 siegreich: abhijitā tejasā tejo jinva  VS. 15,7 .
— b〉 unter dem Sternbilde Abhijit geboren  P. 4,3,36 . Vgl. ābhijita.
— 2〉 m.
a〉 N. eines eintägigen Soma-Opfers, eine Unterabtheilung der grossen Opferfeier des Gavām-ayana: viśvajiccābhijicca yaḥ  AV. 11,7,12 . ete eva pūrve ahanī abhijidatirātraḥ  ŚAT. BR. 13,5,4,4 . 12,1,2,2 . 12 . 4,2 . 2,1,3 . 2,21 . 3,2 . 10 . 11 . 4,15 . 3,1,4 . 8 .  AIT. BR. 4,19 . 6,18 .  ĀŚV. ŚR. 8,5 . 13 . 10,1 . u. s. w.  KĀTY. ŚR. 13,2,5 . 13 . 20,8,14 . 22,1,6 . 7 . 36 . 42 . 24,2,2 . 3 . 8 . 6,45 . 23,1,20 . 5,26 . 24,1,17 . 4,5 . 5,4 . 7,35 .  M. 11,74 .  R. 1,13,45 .  Verz. d. B. H. 72,10 . 73,8 . 19,9 .
— b〉 N. pr. ein Sohn Punarvasuʼs  HARIV. 2016 . Vater Punarvasuʼs  VP. 436 .
— 3〉 f. N. eines Sternbildes: abhijinme rāsatāṃ puṇyameva  AV. 19,7,4 .  HARIV. 3320 . Das 6te Mondhaus nach dem Vollmond, dem Brahman geheiligt,  TAITT. BR. 3,1,2,6 . tataḥ prabhāte vimale muhūrte 'bhijiti prabhuḥ . vasiṣṭhaḥ puṣyayogena brāhmaṇaiḥ parivāritaḥ ..  R. 6,112,70 .  COLEBR. Misc. Ess. II, 341 . 358 .  LIA. I, 746 .  Ind. St. 1,99 .
— 4〉 n. (nach  ŚKDR. ) die 8te Stunde (mahūrta) des Tages: abhijiti śiṣyānupanīya śvobhūte saṃbhārānsaṃbharati  KAUŚ. 139 . aparāhṇe tu saṃprāpte abhijidrauhiṇodaye . yadatra dīyate jantostadakṣayamudāhṛtam ..  MATSYA-P. _im_ ŚKDR.   Verz. d. B. H. No. 912 .

results.rendered_html:
abhijit a. [abhi-ji-kvip]
1 Victorious, conquering completely.
2 Helping in conquering completely.
3 Born under the constellation abhijit  P. IV. 3. 36 , see abhijita
— m.
1 N. of Viṣṇu.
2 N. of a sacrifice, part of the great sacrifice called gavāmayana;  Ms. 11. 75 , also used for atirātra q. v.
3 N. of a star; N. of one of the lunar mansions.
— n.
1 The 8th Muhūrta of the day, midday (fit for a Śrāddha ceremony).
2 N. of a lagna favourable to setting out.
Comp.
— muhūrtaḥ The 8th Muhūrta or period comprising 24 minutes before and 24 minutes after noon.
